title: Cataclysm Z
description: the end has already come — you’re just late
body:
# CATACLYSM
_When the sirens stopped, the world was already gone.
Cities fell silent. Streets filled with the sound of footsteps that weren’t human.
Now, there’s no rescue, no hope — only survival._

This is **_THE CATACLYSM_**, a hardcore survival modpack inspired by Project Zomboid, where every minute alive is earned. Forget everything you know about peaceful Minecraft — hunger, infection, fear, and exhaustion will be your new reality.

### A World That Fights Back

- Zombies are faster, smarter, and more ruthless than ever. They hunt in packs, surround your shelter, and never stop. Every sound you make can bring death to your door.

### Survival Is More Than Just Health

- You’ll have to manage hunger, thirst, body temperature, wounds, and infection — all while scavenging for food, tools, and medicine in a world that’s collapsing around you.

### Immersive Realism

- Dynamic lighting, ambient sounds, and brutal combat combine to make every night terrifying. The rain chills your bones, the dark hides what’s coming, and the silence means they’ve found another victim.

### Build or Die Trying

- You can’t just survive — you have to prepare.
Fortify safehouses, craft barricades, and reinforce every wall, because when the horde comes, nothing lasts forever.

### Every Death Tells a Story

- Maybe you starved. Maybe you froze. Maybe you fought until the end.
Each life is unique — and each death, inevitable.

### Build. Survive. Die. Repeat.
- There are no second chances here. Only stories of those who tried… and the echoes they left behind.
  
### Credits:
- [Horror Elements Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horror-elements-mod)
